content:
Just now

--

Cut me open and slice my heart a tiny bit on the left.
Did you see something?
A tiny machine perhaps, a dream-maker. I figured I have one of those just a few months back. If that phrase is factually true, then where is mine? Is it died already?
Growing up does not necessarily means you will have all the things you dreamed about. The harshest truth lives, creeping inside your brain, waiting to be removed.
So grab a scalpel, lobotomise me on the head.
As blood running down the cheek, a living proof that my heart actually does something. Pumps all the blood, but not dreams.
Reality collides with all these delusional dreams creating a huge neverending hole of despair, and i am falling endlessly.
